prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约10523→11097→11443→11982→10094，2021–2024年呈逐年后移趋势，2025年大幅前移至10094名，为近5年最佳位次，波动较大。2025年基准位次约10094名；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2023年均为33人，2024年增至41人，2025年增至44人；2026年计划54人，较2025年扩招约22.7%，扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解，位次预计后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第90–104名，2026年最新排名第101名，排名稳定在中游211水平；2023年曾出现偏负面师德师风事件（男老师要求女生穿超短裙表演），但2026年高考周期内无显著声誉事件；抖音热度排名第84位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，未出现明显报考热度信号；第五轮学科评估数据中安徽大学未出现A-及以上学科，优势学科不突出，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年贵州物理类考生估算约20.84万人，较2025年20.72万人基本持平，竞争格局稳定；安徽大学位于安徽省合肥市，非贵州本省院校，也无显著地域偏好优势；在贵州招生规模较小，2025年物理类仅44人，2026年扩至54人，占比极低。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常前移（10094名）后存在回归均值压力、2026年大幅扩招22.7%使位次后移、以及考生总数基本持平等因素，预计2026年最低位次将较2025年明显后移。预测最低位次约11501名，区间11001–12001名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 10523 → 11097 → 11443 → 11982 → 10094. From 2021 to 2024, there was a trend of year-by-year decline, but in 2025, it significantly advanced to 10094, the best ranking in the past five years, showing large fluctuations. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10094. The provincial science/physics enrollment plan was 33 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 41 in 2024, and to 44 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 54, an expansion of about 22.7% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase, easing competition pressure and likely causing the ranking to decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it has been around 90–104 in recent years, with the latest 2026 ranking at 101, stable at the mid-tier 211 level. In 2023, there was a negative teacher ethics incident (a male teacher required female students to wear miniskirts for a performance), but no significant reputation events occurred during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle. On Douyin, its popularity ranks 84th, rated as 'average', with moderately low exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious application heat signal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Anhui University did not have any A- or above disciplines, with no outstanding advantageous disciplines, limiting its appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of physics category examinees in Guizhou is about 208,400, roughly flat compared to 207,200 in 2025, indicating a stable competitive landscape. Anhui University is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local Guizhou institution, and has no significant regional preference advantage. Its enrollment scale in Guizhou is small, with only 44 physics category students in 2025, expanding to 54 in 2026, accounting for a very low proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal advancement of the 2025 ranking (10094) with pressure to revert to the mean, the significant 22.7% expansion in 2026 causing the ranking to decline, and the roughly stable total number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11501, with a range of 11001–12001.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11001–12001, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 11000), prioritize aiming for popular engineering majors in Tier 1; if the ranking is near the upper bound (around 12000), it is advisable to focus on Tier 3 majors for stability.
